query:
SELECT 
  ed.esrsStandard,
  COUNT(*) as mapping_count
FROM regulation_esrs_mappings rem
JOIN esrs_datapoints ed ON rem.datapointId = ed.id
GROUP BY ed.esrsStandard
ORDER BY mapping_count DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 31QbGTVHxF7ThTp.root --database cozU6EotfgGjqPV9552owj --execute SELECT 
  ed.esrsStandard,
  COUNT(*) as mapping_count
FROM regulation_esrs_mappings rem
JOIN esrs_datapoints ed ON rem.datapointId = ed.id
GROUP BY ed.esrsStandard
ORDER BY mapping_count DESC;
